title: Summon/SpawnMinion EventHandler Analysis
description: Comprehensive analysis of minion spawning and command systems in Menace tactical combat

SpawnEntityEffectHandler.description: Core handler for spawning entities (minions and structures) during skill use

+0x10.name: ParentSkill
+0x10.description: Reference to the skill that owns this effect handler

+0x18.name: EffectConfig
+0x18.description: Configuration data for the spawn effect

+0x20.name: SpawnedEntities
+0x20.description: Tracks currently spawned entities for max spawn enforcement

values.1: OnUse - deferred spawn with wait flag
values.2: OnTileHit - spawn when skill hits target

+0x60.name: EntityTemplate
+0x60.description: Template defining what entity to spawn

+0x68.name: SpawnAsMinion
+0x68.description: If true, assigns MinionID and registers with command skills

+0x70.name: AnimatorParameter
+0x70.description: Animation trigger for spawn visual effects

+0x78.name: FaceOwner
+0x78.description: If true, spawned entity faces its owner on spawn

+0x80.name: HideWhenMaxReached
+0x80.description: Hide skill from UI when spawn limit reached

SpawnEntity.description: Main spawn logic. Creates TransientActor or Structure based on EntityType. Handles faction assignment, container spawning, orientation, and minion skill registration.

OnMissionStarted.description: Initializes spawn tracking list if MaxNumberOfSpawns > 0

OnUse.signature: void OnUse(Skill skill, Entity user, ref bool wait)
OnUse.description: Handles skill use. Defers if SpawnTrigger==1, spawns immediately otherwise

OnTileHit.description: Spawns entity when skill hits target tile

OnUpdate.description: Removes dead entities from spawn tracking list

IsUsable.description: Returns true if spawn count < max or unlimited

IsHidden.description: Returns true if HideWhenMaxReached and at spawn limit

IsApplicableTo.description: Returns true if target tile is empty

CommandMoveHandler.description: Handler for commanding minions to move to target tiles

OnMinionSpawned.description: Registers spawned minion with this handler

OnUse.signature: void OnUse(Skill skill, Entity user, Tile target)
OnUse.description: Commands minion to move to target tile using MoveToWithSkill(flags=5)

OnMovementFinished.description: Clears skill busy state and updates movement range display

Create.description: Factory method to create handler instance

CommandUseSkillHandler.description: Handler for commanding minions to use skills on targets

+0x60.name: SkillTemplate
+0x60.description: Template for skill the minion will use

OnMinionSpawned.description: Registers minion and updates owner's skill container

OnUse.signature: void OnUse(Skill skill, Entity user, Tile target)
OnUse.description: Creates skill from template and commands minion to use it

OnDeath.description: Clears minion reference when controlled minion dies

IsHidden.description: Returns !IsUsable() - hidden when no valid minion

Create.description: Factory method to create handler instance

Actor.description: Base class for tactical combat entities

+0x48.name: IsAlive
+0x48.description: Whether the actor is currently alive

TransientActor.description: Mobile, controllable spawned unit (e.g., drones, turrets)

+0x1b8.name: Template
+0x1b8.description: Template this actor was spawned from

Create.signature: void Create(EntityTemplate template, Tile spawnTile, int faction, int flags)
Create.description: Initializes actor from template with skills, items, and properties

spawn_flow.description: Complete flow for spawning and controlling a minion

steps.action: SpawnEntity validates target tile is empty
Creates TransientActor or Structure based on EntityType
Assigns faction (player faction swaps to enemy ID 2)
steps.details: Ensures spawned entities have correct faction alignment

steps.action: If FaceOwner, calculates orientation toward owner
If owner is container, spawns inside and moves out

steps.details: Sets animator parameter on entity's Element

steps.action: Adds entity to spawn tracking list

steps.details: Notifies game systems of new entity

steps.action: If SpawnAsMinion, assigns MinionID and finds ICommandMinionSkill
steps.details: Increments global counter, iterates owner skills to find matching command skill
Registers minion with CommandMoveHandler or CommandUseSkillHandler

command_flow.description: Flow for commanding a spawned minion
move_command: Player activates CommandMove skill on owner
On completion, OnMovementFinished() clears busy state
skill_command: Player activates CommandUseSkill skill on owner

ICommandMinionSkill.description: Interface for skill handlers that can control minions

SpawnCounter.description: Static int incremented for each minion spawn, used to assign MinionIDs

TacticalManager.OnDeath.description: Event fired when any actor dies, used by CommandUseSkillHandler for cleanup
